headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Solstice Advanced Mat, Lowers Price Target to $90
summary: BMO Capital  analyst John McNulty   maintains Solstice Advanced Mat (NASDAQ:SOLS) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $101 to $90.
